name: mdz-monorepo
description: MDZ (Markdown Zipped Container) — monorepo root. See README.md and ROADMAP.md. The installable packages live in packages/; the CLI lives in cli/; reference implementations in implementations/.
comment-devdeps: adm-zip is hoisted to the root so cross-package test runners (browser-extension/build.js, tests/conformance/integrity/run_integrity_conformance.js) can require it without reaching into a sibling package's node_modules. The cli package keeps its own copy because it ships as a published binary.
